roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S PC1473,7 MOTION VACATE CONVICTION FILED

/CAL: MOTION TO VACATE PURSUANT TO PC1473,7; DA NON-OPP TO SET ASIDE/NP/X:THE PEOPLE DO NOT OPPOSE PETITIONER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE GUILTY PLEA,ENTER A NOT GUILTY PLEA AND SET ASIDE THE CONVICTION AND SENTENCE OF OCTOBER 25, 1995/MO GRTD/X: PLEA DATE:09-27-1995/X: SENTENCE DATE:10-25-1995//X: THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT WAS NOT PROPERLY ADVISED OF THE POTENTIAL CONSEQUENCES OF A GUILTY PLEA, /CTORD: THE CONVICTION AND SENTENCE WERE ILLEGAL AND INVALID,  PREJUDICIAL ERROR DAMAGED THE DEFENDANT,  ACCORDINGLY, THE GUILTY PLEA ENTERED ON 09-27-1995 IS SET ASIDE A NOT GUILTY PLEA IS ENTERED, THE SENTENCE ENTERED ON 10-25-1995 ARE HEREBY VACATED, /X: THERE BEINGNO NEW PLEA ENTERED, THE COURT ORDERS THE MATTER DISMISSED/MO PC 1385: INTEREST OF JUSTICE/X: ORDER SIGNED AND FILED/
/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN (FTA 07-08-98 APD MTR, 1ST BW)/BWDNC/CTORD:PROBATION IN #01600502 IS HEREBY TERMINATED AS UNSUCCESSFUL/
DEFT STIP VIOL PROB;ADV CONST RTS;MOD-6MCJ;CTS101DSPN INT SW-M/BASKER;DEFT WVS 80DCTS PERMANENTLY
SPN INT SW-M/BASKER;CONT 11/26/96 TS HG MTR/DA/SUPP RPT 845AM IN D24
CONT'D TS PROB REV HRG DA//H1:961105/0845/S24
CERT TO SUP CT, SEE DOCKET FOR PROPOSED SENT, B/S $5,000
